title: Revival of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Revival of Evangelion             Quote Post by Lamberty » Wed Dec 02, 2009 10:18 pm Hello everyone, It's been some years since I watched Evangelion,(I know a shame), but I do have one question. I recently purchased The Death and Rebirth, End of Evangelion, You are not Alone, but I'm unable to find Revival of Evangelion. Could someone please inform/tell me where I could buy this movie? I really want to finish this series off. Also, I know this sounds really dumb but is Rebuild of Evangelion out, and if so, could you point me in the direction to purchase that one as well. Thanks for your help.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Dec 02, 2009 10:22 pm http://wiki.evageeks.org/Revival_of_Evangelion You have already finished the series, it seems.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Wed Dec 02, 2009 10:25 pm Rebuild is four movies, only the first of which has been licensed in the West--that's You Are (Not) Alone . Revival of Evangelion was really just a recut of Death and Rebirth , and was eventually included overseas as the last part of the Renewal box set. Unfortunately, to my knowledge, Manga Entertainment's release of Death & Rebirth and End of Evangelion don't come from this set, so "Revival" was never released over here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 02, 2009 11:44 pm Revival: Death (true)^2 (Final cut of Death, any new footage originally made for it is mainly in the DC episodes) and EoE, no Rebirth* included. The remastered release of the series+films is called Renewal in Japan. While the remastered series is out in the States as Platinum, the remastered films have yet to be released in the States. (I blame Mangle for sitting on the license. =_=) *btw, Mangle never released the actual Rebirth, just what's been dubbed "Re-Air".

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Dec 02, 2009 11:50 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Mangle never released the actual Rebirth, just what's been dubbed "Re-Air".

[]:             Quote Post by Lamberty » Wed Dec 02, 2009 11:59 pm Cool, so then just have to wait on Mangle to release the rest. Thank you everyone for your responses.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Thu Dec 03, 2009 12:04 am Sorry to break it to you, but they don't have the licences anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:06 am cyharding wrote: Sorry to break it to you, but they don't have the licences anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Sat Dec 05, 2009 11:11 am Really hoping that either part of ADV which has broken into several smaller companies due to the economy or Funimation will buy the rights to the films so we can actually get a better quality copy i have the Mangle set but its looks sorta rough video quality wise, especially death.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Wed Dec 16, 2009 8:49 pm Kamina wrote: Really hoping that either part of ADV which has broken into several smaller companies due to the economy or Funimation will buy the rights to the films so we can actually get a better quality copy i have the Mangle set but its looks sorta rough video quality wise, especially death.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Dec 17, 2009 5:54 pm tomrule123 wrote: Let's hope, if Funimation gets it, Funimation doesn't mess it up (maybe a blu-ray version would be nice)

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Thu Dec 17, 2009 6:20 pm Ornette wrote: It would just be an upscale, would be a waste.

I recently purchased The Death and Rebirth, End of Evangelion, You are not Alone, but I'm unable to find Revival of Evangelion. Could someone please inform/tell me where I could buy this movie?
